title: brachyscome basaltica var. basaltica
intro: Brachyscome basaltica var. basaltica, also known as Alpine Button Daisy, is a small, flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and compact growth habit. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in herbal medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Brachyscome basaltica var. basaltica have been associated with potential health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and antimicrobial activity. Brachyscome basaltica var. basaltica is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
